heading: Exemption from Metric Conversion Act of 1975
label: 3873 Exemption from Metric Conversion Act of 1975
text: The Commission is exempt from the provisions of the Metric Conversion Act of 1975 ( et seq.).15 U.S.C. 205a
notes: References in TextThe Metric Conversion Act of 1975, referred to in section catchline and text, is , , , which is classified generally to subchapter II (§ 205a et seq.) of chapter 6 of Title 15, Commerce and Trade. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 94–16889 Stat. 1007section 205a of Title 15Dec. 23, 1975
